title: stipa caucasica subsp. glareosa
intro: Stipa caucasica subsp. glareosa, also known as Caucasian feather grass or red-stemmed feather grass, is a perennial grass native to the Caucasus region. The plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Stipa caucasica subsp. glareosa include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared as herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is often used in folk medicine to treat various health conditions.
